---
title: "Poster"
---

The poster summarises the project problem, approach, Shiny application overview, investigation workflow, conclusion, and future work.

::: {.image-card .poster-card}
![](poster.png){fig-alt='TenantThread Embargo Breach project poster' width='100%'}
:::

::: {.poster-actions}
[Download the poster](poster.png){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
